label: Bruno: Run current YAML request
command: file="$ZED_FILE"; dir="$ZED_DIRNAME"; while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/bruno.json" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/opencollection.yml" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; if [ ! -f "$dir/bruno.json" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/opencollection.yml" ]; then echo "No Bruno collection root found for $file"; exit 4; fi; rel=${file#"$dir/"}; cd "$dir" && "${BRU:-bru}" run "$rel"

label: Bruno: Run current collection
command: dir="$ZED_DIRNAME"; while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/bruno.json" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/opencollection.yml" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; if [ ! -f "$dir/bruno.json" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/opencollection.yml" ]; then echo "No Bruno collection root found for $ZED_FILE"; exit 4; fi; cd "$dir" && "${BRU:-bru}" run
